title: Kalle på Spången
writer: Theodor Berthels, Edvard Persson, Henry Richter
actors: Edvard Persson, Bullan Weijden, John Degerberg
plot: Kalle Jeppson is the joyful owner of a rural inn, "Spången" (The Footbridge). His only problems are the all the bylaws that makes it difficult to have a quiet drink and the shrew of his wife who is always nagging on him. Kalle is ...
